ruins_page.title: Ruins' Rhapsody
ruins_page.subtitle: A third-person Action-Adventure framework focusing on traversal, exploration, and C++ systems.

about.title: The Quest for the Lost Heart
desc: Step into the boots of Alessandra Morioka, a daring archaeologist on a mission to uncover the Lost Heart of Arachne.
Originally developed as an academy thesis and later refined into a technical demo, this project showcases a custom third-person framework.
Inspired by classics like Tomb Raider, the project focuses on bridging character mechanics with reliable backend systems in C++.

gameplay.title: Core Gameplay Experience
items: • Advanced Traversal: A movement system featuring climbing, ledge navigation, and a dedicated swimming component with breath management.
• Inventory System: A structured inventory divided into Weapons (Pistol), Utilities (Medkits and Keys for progression), and Collectibles (Statues).
• Combat & AI: A base combat framework featuring a robotic enemy managed via Behavior Trees and automated sensing.
• Exploration: A modular island environment divided into three main areas: the Ancient Temple, the Underground Caves, and the Open Ruins.

tech.title: Core Architecture (C++)
items: • C++ Component Logic: Core mechanics like Climbing, Swimming, and Health are encapsulated in C++ components for better reusability.
• Level Streaming: Transitioned from standalone levels to a persistent world with sub-level streaming to optimize memory and flow.
• Save/Load System: A robust C++ serialization pipeline that tracks sub-level states, player position, and inventory persistence.
• Custom Collision: Implementation of specialized Trace Channels for high-precision interaction with environment and objects.

systems.title: UI & Optimization
items: • Multi-layered UI: Includes an immersive 3D Main Menu, a functional inventory, and a comprehensive settings menu for performance tuning.
• Localisation: A built-in system allowing real-time switching between English and Italian.
• Ambient Audio: Integrated environmental soundscapes including wind, wildlife, and cave echoes to enhance immersion.
• Asset Management: Extensive cleanup and texture optimization to ensure a stable experience across different hardware.

codemap_desc: The initial software map designed during the thesis phase, outlining the class hierarchy and communication logic between core systems.
View Technical PDF
gallery.components_desc: Overview of the modular component stack in Blueprint, showing how C++ logic (Climb, Swim, Inventory) is attached to the character.
gallery.input_desc: Usage of UE5 Enhanced Input for a scalable control scheme covering traversal, combat, and UI interaction.
gallery.ai_desc: Setup for enemy sensing, interactive world objects, and visual feedback through Niagara VFX.
gallery.bt_desc: The logic flow for the robotic guardian, handling patrol states, player detection, and engagement.
